section_order: Hero → Features Grid → Social Proof → Pricing → Final CTA
cta_placement: Above fold primary CTA; repeated after social proof
color_strategy: Primary in hero; neutral features section; CTA color for buttons throughout
effects: Glassmorphism hero cards; hover lift on features; smooth scroll between sections
conversion_tips: Keep hero headline under 8 words; show value prop in 3 seconds; single primary CTA per viewport

section_order: Hero with demo → Pain points → Solution features → Testimonials → Pricing table → FAQ → CTA
cta_placement: Hero CTA (Start Free Trial); sticky header CTA; post-pricing CTA
color_strategy: Gradient hero; white features section; dark social proof; primary pricing highlight
effects: Animated hero illustration; feature reveal on scroll; pricing toggle animation
conversion_tips: Lead with the pain point not the product; show pricing early; use annual/monthly toggle defaulting to annual

section_order: Full-screen hero video → Problem/Solution → Product showcase → Features → Early access CTA
cta_placement: Centered hero CTA; floating bottom bar on scroll
color_strategy: Dark cinematic hero; light product section; accent CTAs
effects: Autoplay muted video hero; parallax product shots; countdown timer
conversion_tips: Create urgency with limited access; show the product in use; use social proof numbers

section_order: Hero with transformation → Before state → After state → How it works → Testimonials → CTA
cta_placement: After the transformation reveal; bottom of page
color_strategy: Muted before section; vibrant after section; CTA in accent color
effects: Slider before/after comparison; animated statistics; scroll-triggered reveals
conversion_tips: Show the transformation visually not just in text; use real customer results; make the before state relatable

section_order: Narrative hero → Chapter sections → Character/founder story → Mission → Join CTA
cta_placement: End of story arc; embedded in narrative
color_strategy: Evolving palette that shifts with the story; warm emotional tones
effects: Parallax storytelling; text reveals; ambient background changes
conversion_tips: Make the reader the hero of the story; keep sections focused; end with emotional CTA

section_order: Hero with metrics → Logo bar → Testimonial carousel → Case studies → Features → CTA
cta_placement: After logo bar; after case studies
color_strategy: Trust-building blues and greens; neutral backgrounds; accent CTAs
effects: Counter animations for metrics; testimonial auto-scroll; logo bar marquee
conversion_tips: Lead with impressive numbers; show recognizable logos; use video testimonials

section_order: Hero → Pricing table → Feature comparison → Testimonials → FAQ → CTA
cta_placement: Pricing table is above fold; secondary CTA after FAQ
color_strategy: Highlight recommended plan with primary color; neutral comparison table
effects: Pricing toggle animation; feature tooltip reveals; plan highlight glow
conversion_tips: Default to recommended plan; use checkmarks vs X marks; show savings on annual

section_order: Hero with app screenshot → Feature walkthrough → Integration logos → Pricing → CTA
cta_placement: Hero CTA (Get Started); after feature walkthrough
color_strategy: Dark app preview; light explainer sections; primary CTAs
effects: App screenshot with hover hotspots; feature tab switching; integration logo grid
conversion_tips: Show the actual product not illustrations; highlight the aha moment; use interactive preview

section_order: Hero (Better than X) → Comparison table → Unique features → Migration guide → Testimonials → CTA
cta_placement: After comparison table; after migration guide
color_strategy: Competitive red/orange for comparison; green for your advantages
effects: Animated comparison checkmarks; side-by-side highlights; migration step reveals
conversion_tips: Be specific about differences; show migration is easy; use competitor user testimonials

section_order: Hero with community stats → Member spotlight → Activity feed → Events → Join CTA
cta_placement: Hero CTA (Join Community); after member spotlights
color_strategy: Warm community colors; vibrant member sections; inclusive design
effects: Live activity feed animation; member avatar grid; event countdown
conversion_tips: Show community activity is real and recent; highlight member diversity; make joining feel easy

section_order: Hero article → Featured posts grid → Category navigation → Newsletter signup → Archive
cta_placement: Newsletter signup after featured posts; sticky sidebar CTA
color_strategy: Clean readable typography-focused; subtle category colors
effects: Smooth article card hover; reading progress bar; infinite scroll
conversion_tips: Prioritize readability over design; show reading time; use compelling featured images

section_order: Hero food image → Menu highlights → About/Story → Gallery → Reservation CTA → Location map
cta_placement: Reservation CTA in header and after gallery; floating mobile CTA
color_strategy: Warm appetizing colors; dark elegant header; warm body sections
effects: Food image parallax; menu category tabs; gallery lightbox
conversion_tips: Use high-quality food photography; keep menu scannable; make reservation prominent

section_order: Full-screen project hero → Project grid → About → Skills → Contact CTA
cta_placement: Contact CTA after about section; project CTAs inline
color_strategy: Minimal palette; let project colors shine; dark or light base
effects: Project hover reveals; smooth page transitions; cursor effects
conversion_tips: Let work speak for itself; curate don't show everything; make contact easy

section_order: Hero banner → Category grid → Featured products → New arrivals → Newsletter → Trust badges
cta_placement: Add to cart on product hover; collection CTA in hero; sticky cart
color_strategy: Category-specific accent colors; trust green for badges; urgency red for sales
effects: Quick-view product overlay; add-to-cart animation; infinite scroll products
conversion_tips: Show prices clearly; use high-quality product images; minimize clicks to purchase

section_order: Hero with date countdown → Speakers grid → Schedule → Venue → Sponsors → Register CTA
cta_placement: Register CTA in hero and sticky header; after speakers section
color_strategy: Bold event branding; speaker section neutral; sponsor section clean
effects: Countdown timer; speaker card flip; schedule tab animation
conversion_tips: Lead with the date and headline speaker; show the venue; create FOMO with limited tickets

section_order: Hero with instructor → Curriculum outline → Student results → Testimonials → Pricing → Enroll CTA
cta_placement: Enroll CTA after curriculum and after testimonials; sticky bottom bar
color_strategy: Professional trust colors; warm instructor section; clear pricing
effects: Curriculum accordion expand; progress indicator; video preview modal
conversion_tips: Show what students achieve; break curriculum into digestible modules; offer money-back guarantee

section_order: Hero with impact image → Mission statement → Impact numbers → Stories → Donate CTA → Partners
cta_placement: Donate CTA in hero; floating donate button; after impact stories
color_strategy: Emotional warm colors; hope-inspiring greens; urgent orange CTAs
effects: Impact counter animation; story carousel; donation amount selector
conversion_tips: Lead with emotion not logic; show specific impact per dollar; make donation amounts tangible

section_order: Hero with phone mockup → Feature carousel → App store ratings → Screenshots → Download CTA
cta_placement: Download CTA in hero; app store buttons after screenshots; QR code
color_strategy: App brand colors; clean white sections; platform-specific buttons
effects: Phone mockup rotation; screenshot carousel; rating star animation
conversion_tips: Show the app in context; feature phone screenshots; include app store ratings

section_order: Hero property gallery → Property details → Floor plan → Neighborhood → Agent contact → Similar properties
cta_placement: Contact agent CTA sticky sidebar; schedule viewing after details
color_strategy: Premium neutral tones; property-specific accent; trust professional colors
effects: Image gallery slider; virtual tour embed; map interaction; mortgage calculator
conversion_tips: Lead with best property photo; show floor plans; include neighborhood info

section_order: Hero with value prop → How it works (3 steps) → Features → Testimonial → CTA
cta_placement: Single strong CTA repeated 2-3 times; hero and bottom
color_strategy: Bold primary gradient hero; clean white middle; dark footer CTA
effects: Scroll-triggered step animations; feature icon animations; CTA pulse
conversion_tips: Keep it to one page; explain in 3 simple steps; one clear CTA action

section_order: Hero addressing both sides → Seller benefits → Buyer benefits → How it works → Trust/Safety → Join CTA
cta_placement: Dual CTAs for buyers and sellers; after trust section
color_strategy: Split design for two audiences; neutral shared sections; distinct CTAs
effects: Split-screen hero; tab switching between audiences; trust badge animations
conversion_tips: Address both audiences clearly; show transaction safety; highlight success stories from both sides

section_order: Hero with free tier → Free features → Premium comparison → Success stories → Upgrade CTA
cta_placement: Upgrade CTA after comparison table; trial CTA in hero
color_strategy: Free tier neutral; premium tier primary/gold; clear visual hierarchy
effects: Feature unlock animations; premium glow effects; comparison slide
conversion_tips: Make free tier genuinely useful; show clear upgrade value; use progressive disclosure

section_order: Hero with reel/portfolio → Services grid → Process steps → Case studies → Team → Contact CTA
cta_placement: Contact CTA after case studies; floating contact button
color_strategy: Bold creative palette; professional case study sections; approachable team
effects: Portfolio autoplay reel; service card hover details; case study before/after
conversion_tips: Show results not just services; highlight the process; make team approachable

section_order: Hero with reassuring image → Services → Doctor profiles → Patient testimonials → Insurance → Book appointment CTA
cta_placement: Book appointment in header; after doctor profiles; floating mobile CTA
color_strategy: Calming teal/blue; warm doctor sections; accessible contrast
effects: Smooth appointment calendar; doctor filter; symptom checker interactive
conversion_tips: Lead with trust and credentials; show real doctors; make booking frictionless
